# Typos and small wording fixes

## Summary
Low-effort cleanup. All Peyman; John reviews at the end. Do these as one pass.

## Files
- `writeup/hot_towel.tex` — search each string below and fix

## Keep in mind
- Do as one pass near the end, after structural rewrites are done (to avoid re-introducing typos when rewriting).
- Use grep/ripgrep to find each occurrence; some may appear in multiple places.

## Actionable items

### From R1
- [ ] "compared to comparable" — reword
- [ ] "less job applications" → "fewer job applications"
- [ ] "not specify what message is" — rewrite sentence
- [ ] "possibly become a possibly" — remove duplicate word
- [ ] "worker differ" → "workers differ"
- [ ] "statics continues" → "statics continue"
- [ ] "Denote the expected utility they can generate in other markets be" — fix broken syntax
- [ ] "due in part to employers consider" — fix missing verb

### From R2
- [ ] Replace all "-Y% decrease" phrasing with "Y% decrease"
- [ ] Proposition 1 terminology: standardize "part" / "bullet" / "Part"
- [ ] Footnote 13: "L/H/Medium" inconsistent — use "I" for intermediate

### Minor (from R2/Editor)
- [ ] Footnote 11: missing right bracket
- [ ] Use ":=" consistently for definitions throughout
- [ ] "can reject" → "rejects" (p. 11)
- [ ] "message off-equilibrium" → "message off the equilibrium path" (p. 12)

## Source
R1 typos list; R2 smaller comments; Editor's Letter §5.

## Owner
Peyman.
